inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $25.68M minus capital spending $0.93M, divided by 99.23M diluted weighted-average shares (10-K filed 2026-03-13)
inputs.dividend_source: Cash dividend declared $0.20 per share November 2025 (S-3 filing 2025-11-25)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses GAAP owner cash; life-settlement policy maturities make operating cash lumpy (Q1 2026 OCF $91.7M vs FY2025 $25.7M). Adjusted EBITDA cited in narrative only, not in FCF0.

bear.notes: Mortality assumption miss; funding cost spike; integration drag from Carlisle/FCF deals

base.notes: Life Solutions origination scale + asset-management fee growth; securitization lowers funding cost

bull.notes: Repeatable $50M+ securitizations; Abacus Intel tech fees ramp; dividend maintained

segments.label: Life Solutions (policy origination and servicing)
segments.evidence: FY2025 segment revenue $200.7M of $235.2M total; operating income consolidated $88.8M (10-K segment note)

segments.label: Asset Management (FCF Advisors and managed accounts)
segments.evidence: FY2025 segment revenue $33.8M; FCF Advisors acquired Dec 2024 (10-K Business section)

options.label: Life insurance policy portfolio (balance-sheet investments)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Policy investments carried at fair value on balance sheet; not modeled as separate terminal — embedded in Life Solutions cash path
options.evidence: Available-for-sale life settlement investments ~$500M+ on balance sheet (10-K Note 4); fair-value marks flow through earnings

options.label: Repeatable securitized funding (Oct 2025 $50M note)
options.evidence: 10-K: October 2025 $50M investment-grade securitized note; lowers cost of capital for Life Solutions growth

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Policy portfolio marked to fair value; equity $418M vs EV ~$1.3B at price (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: All three reportable segments profitable at gross profit level FY2025

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Policy servicing fees and future mortality gains on owned policies not in GAAP OCF starting point

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material private equity stakes disclosed

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating platform; $0.20 dividend is ongoing policy not recovery trade

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Securitization and tech verification embedded in Life Solutions growth assumption

growth_explanation.base_growth_mechanism: Roll-up of life-settlement originators (Carlisle 2024, FCF Advisors 2024) plus repeatable securitized funding should lift owner cash faster than FY2025 GAAP OCF implies.

falsifiers.observation: Longevity improvements extend policy lives and compress returns
Credit spreads widen on ABXL notes or warehouse lines
Integration costs from acquisitions exceed disclosed $11.8M FY2025 add-backs

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 GAAP free cash flow per share only

blended_best.weights: 100% Marvin GAAP floor (no approved third party)
blended_best.notes: Filings-only; adjusted EBITDA $1.34/sh not in Lawrence base

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. The legacy Lawrence return path remains a separate stance gate until proofs are decision-grade.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Five additive components map Life Solutions operating engine, asset-management fees, Abacus Intel technology option, net financial claims, and longevity/funding reserve once each.

components.label: Life Solutions origination, servicing, and policy spread engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260313_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_017775.htm: FY2025 revenue $235.238M, operating income $88.757M, OCF $25.680465M; ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_033136.htm: Q1 cash $37.21M, debt $291.844M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Normalized owner earnings per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating income per share anchors Life Solutions and servicing economics; policy portfolio fair-value marks flow through earnings, not a separate additive NAV layer.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted reinvestment capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses longevity risk and funding spread widening; base mid-cycle rollup path; bull modest securitization and origination scale without peak-cycle heroics.

components.label: Asset Management fee franchise (FCF Advisors and managed accounts)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260313_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_017775.htm: FY2025 revenue $235.238M, operating income $88.757M, OCF $25.680465M; ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_033136.htm: Q1 cash $37.21M, debt $291.844M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Asset Management segment revenue $33.8M of $235.2M total (FY2025 segment note)

assumptions.label: Normalized fee-based owner cash per share (FCF Advisors and managed accounts)
assumptions.rationale: 25% of segment revenue converted to owner cash proxy pending segment-level margin disclosure; FCF Advisors acquired December 2024.

assumptions.label: Fee-franchise capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Low assumes integration drag; base steady AUM fee growth; bull scales FCF-themed products.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260313_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_017775.htm: FY2025 revenue $235.238M, operating income $88.757M, OCF $25.680465M; ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_033136.htm: Q1 cash $37.21M, debt $291.844M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Technology Services segment revenue $0.7M; Abacus Intel launched Q4 2024

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted Abacus Intel verification and API monetization
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping technology option beyond Life Solutions servicing cash; base is judgment band on early revenue traction.

components.label: Net cash and recourse debt claims on common equity

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260313_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_017775.htm: FY2025 revenue $235.238M, operating income $88.757M, OCF $25.680465M; ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_033136.htm: Q1 cash $37.21M, debt $291.844M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

inputs.label: Cash and cash equivalents at March 31, 2026
Reported debt including current maturities and securitized notes

source.locator: Current maturities $1.5M + long-term debt $275.8M + securitized notes $14.5M (March 31, 2026)

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after recourse debt
assumptions.rationale: Filing-locked cash less reported debt; low stresses warehouse and ABXL spread widening; high credits non-recourse securitization carve-outs not modeled as full equity reduction.

components.label: Longevity, mortality-assumption, and funding-spread stress reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260313_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_017775.htm: FY2025 revenue $235.238M, operating income $88.757M, OCF $25.680465M; ABX/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001628280_26_033136.htm: Q1 cash $37.21M, debt $291.844M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 GAAP free cash flow per share

source.locator: FY2025 OCF $25.680465M less capex $0.93M on 99.231M diluted shares

assumptions.label: Longevity, mortality-assumption, and funding-spread stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for insured longevity improvements, credit spread widening on ABXL notes, and integration execution risk not fully embedded in operating multiple.

calculations.label: Longevity and funding reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ABX, including every identified Life Solutions operating claim, asset-management fee franchise, Abacus Intel technology option, net financial claims, and longevity/funding reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components with non-overlapping overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q filing-derived inputs. Adjusted EBITDA is narrative context only; Lawrence base uses GAAP owner cash.

component_groups.label: Life Solutions origination, servicing, and policy spread engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Life Solutions origination, servicing, and policy spread engine
component_groups.valuation_basis: FY2025 operating income per share × reinvestment capitalization multiple.
component_groups.adjustments: Policy portfolio fair-value marks embedded in earnings path, not separate NAV.

component_groups.label: Asset Management fee franchise (FCF Advisors and managed accounts)
component_groups.economic_claim: Asset Management fee franchise (FCF Advisors and managed accounts)
component_groups.valuation_basis: 25% of segment revenue converted to owner-cash proxy × fee multiple.
component_groups.adjustments: Segment margin pending full disclosure; FCF Advisors acquired December 2024.

component_groups.label: Abacus Intel mortality-verification platform option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on early Technology Services revenue.
component_groups.adjustments: Low case zero; base/high bound API monetization beyond Life Solutions servicing.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base case assumes 15–25% probability of scaled third-party API adoption within seven years given $0.7M FY2025 Technology Services revenue.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year horizon aligned with Lawrence model; commercial traction expected years 3–5 if Abacus Intel gains institutional verification clients.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental R&D and sales capital for Abacus Intel embedded in consolidated operating spend; no separate owner-funded capex line disclosed.

component_groups.label: Net cash and recourse debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and recourse debt claims on common equity
component_groups.valuation_basis: Q1 2026 cash less reported debt per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: High case credits partial non-recourse securitization carve-out.

component_groups.label: Longevity, mortality-assumption, and funding-spread stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Longevity, mortality-assumption, and funding-spread stress reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Negative reserve scaled to GAAP FCF per share and funding-risk band.
component_groups.adjustments: Separate from operating multiple; captures longevity and ABXL spread stress.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Life Solutions origination, servicing, and policy spread engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Life Solutions origination, servicing, and policy spread engine
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Life Solutions origination, servicing, and policy spread engine

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

low.label: Normalized owner earnings per diluted share
low.rationale: FY2025 operating income per share anchors Life Solutions and servicing economics; policy portfolio fair-value marks flow through earnings, not a separate additive NAV layer.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ABX, including every identified Life Solutions operating claim, asset-management fee franchise, Abacus Intel technology option, net financial claims, and longevity/funding reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components with non-overlapping overlap keys.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q filing-derived inputs. Adjusted EBITDA is narrative context only; Lawrence base uses GAAP owner cash.

risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental R&D and sales capital for Abacus Intel embedded in consolidated operating spend; no separate owner-funded capex line disclosed.
